mapper.sql: id, target_type, target_id, user_id, reaction_type, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_reaction (target_type, target_id, user_id, reaction_type, created_at) VALUES (#{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{userId}, #{reactionType}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_reaction SET target_type = #{targetType}, target_id = #{targetId}, user_id = #{userId}, reaction_type = #{reactionType}, created_at = #{createdAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM forum_reaction ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT FROM forum_reaction WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM forum_reaction WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId}
